attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
'Fiscal Year'  BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
UPLD.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT,
1 AS BK_FISCAL_QTR_NUM_INT,
CAST( UPLD.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT||TRIM(1) AS INTEGER) AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QTR_NUM_INT,
UPLD.Q1_DISC_TRGT_PCT AS ADJUSTED_DISCOUNT_TRGT_PCT,
CAST(0 AS  DECIMAL(18,2))  AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_TRGT_PCT ,	  
'N' AS SERVICE_FLG,
SH.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR AS PD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.DV_SALES_TERR_LEVEL_NUM_INT   AS PD_DV_SALES_TERR_LVL_NUM_INT
FROM 
$$MBRDATAVWDB.APP_MBR_DISC_TGT_UPLOAD UPLD, 
$$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SH
WHERE UPLD.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR=SH.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR

UNION ALL

SELECT 
SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
'Fiscal Year'  BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
UPLD.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT,
2 AS BK_FISCAL_QTR_NUM_INT,
CAST( UPLD.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT||TRIM(2) AS INTEGER) AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QTR_NUM_INT,
UPLD.Q2_DISC_TRGT_PCT AS ADJUSTED_DISCOUNT_TRGT_PCT,
CAST(0 AS  DECIMAL(18,2))  AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_TRGT_PCT ,	   
'N' AS SERVICE_FLG,
SH.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR AS PD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.DV_SALES_TERR_LEVEL_NUM_INT   AS PD_DV_SALES_TERR_LVL_NUM_INT

UNION ALL
